headline: Does Huntington’s Bigger Buybacks and Veritex-Cadence Integration Shift the Bull Case For HBAN?
summary: On March 11, 2026, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated presented at the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference in New York, outlining its integration progress with Veritex and Cadence, loan and deposit growth expectations for 2026, and updated capital return plans including planned share repurchases of US$550 million in 2026 and US$1.20 billions in 2027. A distinctive takeaway from the conference was management’s emphasis on capturing revenue synergies from the Veritex...
